hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Two graphs available. Use mcp__graphify-code__query_graph to find files/functions (always current). Use mcp__graphify-semantic__query_graph for architecture/business rules. Only read raw files for exact line-level code."}}' || true

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(0 if '/src/' in p else 1)" 2>/dev/null && /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/bin/graphify update src/ 2>/dev/null && /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/bin/python3.14 -c "import json,pickle; from graphify.export import to_obsidian,to_canvas; from pathlib import Path; G=pickle.loads(Path('graphify-out/.graphify_graph.pkl').read_bytes()); c=json.loads(Path('graphify-out/.graphify_communities.json').read_text()); lp=Path('graphify-out/.graphify_labels.json'); l=json.loads(lp.read_text()) if lp.exists() else {}; to_obsidian(G,c,'graphify-out/obsidian',community_labels=l or None); to_canvas(G,c,'graphify-out/obsidian/graph.canvas',community_labels=l or None)" 2>/dev/null || true
